org.arakhne.neteditor.android.property

Class FigurePropertyEditorView

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.view.View
      • android.view.ViewGroup
        • android.widget.LinearLayout
          • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.property.PropertyEditorView
            • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.property.TablePropertyEditorView
              • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.property.FigurePropertyEditorView
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.graphics.drawable.Drawable.Callback, android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityEventSource, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.ViewManager, android.view.ViewParent

    public class FigurePropertyEditorView
extends TablePropertyEditorView
    Property editor fragment for figures.

    NetEditor Android Panel $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:10

    • Constructor Detail

      • FigurePropertyEditorView

        public FigurePropertyEditorView(android.content.Context context)
        Create a view to edit properties with in the list of package names only the default packages inherited from the ui-android ApkLib, and this ApkLib package.
        Parameters:
        context -

      • FigurePropertyEditorView

        public FigurePropertyEditorView(android.content.Context context,
                        List<String> packageNames)
        Parameters:
        context -
        packageNames - is the list of the package names from which the label resources may be retreived.

    • Method Detail

      • detectTypeFor

        protected TablePropertyEditorView.FieldType detectTypeFor(String propertyName,
                                              Class<?> type)
        Invoked to detect the type of the given property. The default implementation of this function invokes TablePropertyEditorView.toFieldType(Class).

        This function should be overwritten by subclasses to refine the type detection.

        Parameters:
        propertyName - is the name of the property to consider.
        type - is the java type of the property to consider.
        Returns:
        the field type; or null.

      • onCreateFields

        protected void onCreateFields(Collection<? extends PropertyOwner> editedObject)
        Description copied from class: PropertyEditorView
        Invoked to create the fields of the property editor.
        Specified by:
        onCreateFields in class PropertyEditorView
        Parameters:
        editedObject - is the edited object.

      • setPropertiesOf

        public void setPropertiesOf(PropertyOwner owner,
                   Map<String,Object> properties)
        Description copied from class: PropertyEditorView
        Invoked by the API when the properties of an owner must be set.

        This function shuold be overidden by subclasses to enable specific settings.

        Overrides:
        setPropertiesOf in class PropertyEditorView
        Parameters:
        owner - is the object to change.
        properties - are the properties to set.
